promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch for bounded refined-fuel Axis-0 options reduction after the bridge-kernel pass.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the semantic lock, shared index scaffold, rival option families, and staged sim ladder for the Axis-0 lane.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until after the v0.1 option menu was reduced into a smaller reusable A2-mid packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source comparison unless the parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent batch already isolates the semantic lock, shared machinery, option families, sim ladder, and overlay/clock overread markers needed for this bounded reduction pass.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_SEMANTIC_LOCK_OVER_OPTION_MENU
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's strongest anti-drift rule and keeps semantics stronger than any single implementation choice.

candidate_items.name: GENERIC_CPTP_DERIVATIVE_AXIS0_INDEX_KERNEL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Isolates the most reusable operator-level scaffold in the parent batch without forcing a final statistic choice.

candidate_items.name: LOW_COMPLEXITY_AXIS0_BASELINE_OPTION_PAIR
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the simplest practical realizations together as early adjudication baselines without promoting them into winners.

candidate_items.name: BOUNDED_ADVANCED_AXIS0_OPTION_FAMILY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the more advanced option family while keeping it bounded under the file's anti-drift and anti-inflation discipline.

candidate_items.name: STAGED_SIM_ADJUDICATION_WITHOUT_LOCKED_WINNER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the staged evaluation ladder while keeping the option rivalry open and evidence-free at this layer.

candidate_items.name: NONCANON_OVERLAY_SUBORDINATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps readability hooks subordinate to the QIT kernel and prevents overlay backflow into kernel vocabulary.

quarantined_items.name: OPTION_C_AS_ENTROPY_SIGN_REDEFINITION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Option C remains one bounded operational route and must not override the anti-drift rule that Axis-0 is not entropy sign.

quarantined_items.name: WHOLE_OPTION_STACK_AS_ALREADY_LICENSED_KERNEL
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch is a disciplined option menu, not a blanket admission of every statistic, cut family, proxy, and sim layer into kernel machinery.

quarantined_items.name: ROSETTA_OVERLAY_AS_KERNEL_VOCAB
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly keeps Rosetta hooks as noncanon readability scaffolding rather than kernel vocabulary.

quarantined_items.name: SHELL_CUT_CLOCK_AS_PRIMITIVE_TIME_REOPENING
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Shell/cut clock candidates may remain monotone-ordering proposals, but they must not reopen primitive-time ontology inside the bridge lane.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest Axis-0 semantic, formula, and adjudication structures from the parent batch.
They keep source lineage explicit while avoiding fresh raw-source comparison work.
They preserve the menu shape and staged testing discipline without forcing a premature winner.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain overread or inflation risks rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is a strong options surface, but not sufficient to license every advanced route or overlay into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Kept the pass bounded to the v0.1 options menu rather than jumping directly into the v0.2 comparison source.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this refined-fuel Axis-0 options reduction pass.
